title: astragalus antoninae
intro: Astragalus antoninae, also known as the Antonina milkvetch, is a perennial plant belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae), native to China and other parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Astragalus antoninae include reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and enhanced cardiovascular health. Astragalus antoninae can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures for its medicinal uses.
